conservative.name: Echo of Apotheosis
conservative.requirements: 12 favour. You must brandish a holy relic when you invoke this blessing

success.description: As above, and add +2 recharge tokens to this action

chaosStar.description: You are suffused with Sigmar's holy wrath. In the absence of enemies, while this blessing recharges, you will turn on allies, beginning with the least pious

sigmarsComet.description: You are instantly healed of all wounds and all non-Severe Injury critical wounds

reckless.name: Echo of Apotheosis
reckless.requirements: 12 favour. You must brandish a holy relic when you invoke this blessing

success.description: As above, and add 2 recharge tokens to this action

chaosStar.description: You are suffused with Sigmar's holy wrath. In the absence of enemies, while this blessing recharges, you will turn on allies, beginning with the least pious

sigmarsComet.description: You are instantly healed of all wounds and all non-Severe Injury critical wounds
